portfolios.name: Swedish Small Cap & Growth
portfolios.description: An actively managed model portfolio focusing on Swedish small-cap and growth businesses combining strong earnings momentum with exceptional return on capital (ROC).

portfolios.name: Global Dividend Champions
portfolios.description: A defensive, resilient model selection of global dividend champions offering persistent cash flows, dominant market share, and growing distributions.

trades.analysis_text: Volvo AB displays strong pricing power, resilient demand in the heavy commercial vehicles sector, and a very robust order book. With a forward dividend yield of over 6% and solid net cash balance, this represents a low-risk, high-quality industrial compounder. The valuation at P/E 11.5x is highly attractive.

Investor AB offers premier exposure to the best of Swedish industry (Atlas Copco, SEB, ABB, AstraZeneca) alongside an outstanding unlisted portfolio (Patricia Industries). We initiated this position at an attractive Net Asset Value (NAV) discount of 16.5%, allowing us to buy top-tier compounding assets at deep discounts.

We have liquidated our entire position in H&M. The fast-fashion landscape is undergoing structural shifts with rising cost pressures, direct-from-China digital giants expanding rapidly, and rising inventory levels. Reallocating this capital into higher-conviction industrial leaders.

Evolution AB is the undisputed digital monopolist of Live Casino gaming. Generating an EBITDA margin exceeding 70% and a free cash flow conversion Rate close to 100%, its business model is unparalleled. Initiating a 15% model allocation following a healthy market correction.

Microsoft offers outstanding free cash flows supported by extensive leadership in Enterprise SaaS and generative AI across Azure and Copilot workspace integration. Despite premium multiples, structural competitive moats remain dominant.

Novo Nordisk continues to dominate the global market for GLP-1 therapeutics (Ozempic/Wegovy). We expand our allocation during a temporary pricing consolidation, as long-term market dynamics and pipeline growth remain monumental.
Realty Income offers highly predictable monthly cash distributions. Backed by tens of thousands of master-triple-net commercial lease agreements, it acts as a highly resilient defensive anchor.
